instructions: Configure optional external tool integrations below. Set 'enabled' to true and fill in config details for any integration you want to activate. No integrations are required — the pipeline works fully standalone. API keys should be stored in environment variables, never in this file.

crm.description: CRM system for client intelligence enrichment (enhances Phase 1.95)
crm.when_useful: When you have client relationship data in a CRM that could improve bid positioning

proposal_database.description: Proposal management system for content reuse (enhances Phase 8.0 positioning)
proposal_database.when_useful: When you have a library of past proposals that could provide reusable content blocks

document_repository.description: Document management system for accessing past proposals and boilerplate
document_repository.when_useful: When past proposals are stored in SharePoint/Confluence and should be auto-retrieved

notification.description: Send notifications on pipeline events (completion, failures, human review needed)
notification.when_useful: When team members need to be alerted about pipeline status automatically
